display.purpose: App wordmark and the home page hero heading only.

headline.purpose: Page-level titles (Dashboard, Chat, each onboarding step).

body.purpose: Default text for paragraphs, list items, form labels, descriptions.

label.purpose: Captions, muted meta text, timestamps, badge text.

mono.purpose: Commit hashes, file paths, citations, code excerpts.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover/focus/state transitions (Tailwind's transition-all default).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single loud action on a screen — near-black fill, opacity-fade on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary/tertiary action — neutral surface, border, hover to a muted tone.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); border: 1px solid var(--border); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Status Badge — Success
components.description: Low-risk / pass / ingested state — tinted fill, full-strength text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 1.625rem; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-success { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--success) 10%, transparent); color: var(--success); }

components.name: Status Badge — Warning
components.css: .ds-badge-warning { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--warning) 10%, transparent); color: var(--warning); }

components.name: Status Badge — Danger
components.css: .ds-badge-danger { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--danger) 10%, transparent); color: var(--danger); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Base container — flat, ring-separated, no shadow.
components.html:
Bus-factor heatmap
No subsystem data yet.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--card); color: var(--card-foreground); border-radius: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); padding: 1rem; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.375; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted-foreground); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input — height-matched to buttons, hairline border.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 2rem; width: 100%; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid var(--input); background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--input) 50%, transparent); pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Skeleton (loading state)
components.description: Loading placeholder — pulses, never a spinner.
components.css: @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } .ds-skeleton { border-radius: 0.5rem; background: var(--muted); animation: ds-pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite; }

narrative.overview: OwnBoard is where a new hire's understanding of a codebase gets checked against reality, not against vibes. The interface reads like a well-kept ledger: quiet, exact, every entry traceable to a source. It is achromatic by default — near-black ink on paper-white, one hairline gray for structure — because the product's whole premise is that trust comes from citations and commit history, not from visual enthusiasm. Color is spent only where it carries meaning: a status (pass/fail, risk level, confidence), never as decoration. This system explicitly rejects the generic gradient-SaaS register, rejects gamified onboarding, and rejects dense enterprise-dashboard chrome. The existing grayscale, generous-whitespace direction is correct; the job is to formalize it, not replace it.
keyCharacteristics: Achromatic surface (grayscale OKLCH) with color reserved strictly for semantic status.
Flat elevation — structure comes from a 1px ring/border, never a shadow.
One typeface (Geist Sans) carries every UI role; Geist Mono is reserved for anything that is evidence — commit hashes, file paths, citations.
Calm, direct copy. No exclamation points, no 'Woo!', no cutesy empty states.

rules.name: The One Loud Color Rule
rules.body: primary (near-black) is the only non-status color allowed to carry visual weight. Everything else is Paper White, Pale Gray, or a border hairline.

rules.name: The Status-Token-Only Rule
rules.body: Severity, risk level, and pass/fail state are expressed exclusively through success/warning/danger. Raw Tailwind palette colors for status meanings are prohibited.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Every UI role is Geist Sans at a different size/weight step. Do not introduce a second sans-serif for variety.

rules.name: The Evidence-Is-Mono Rule
rules.body: Anything that is cited provenance — a commit hash, a file path, a quoted code line — renders in Geist Mono, never Geist Sans.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces separate from their background via a 1px ring or border, never box-shadow.

dos: Do use success / warning / danger tokens for every status/severity meaning.
Do keep the interface achromatic outside of status color and the single primary graphite.
Do render provenance (commit hashes, file paths, cited snippets) in Geist Mono.
Do ship the full state set (default/hover/focus-visible/active/disabled, plus loading/error/empty) on every component.
Do write calm, direct copy for errors and empty states.
Do keep separation flat: a ring or a single border, never a box-shadow.
donts: Don't use raw Tailwind palette colors for status or severity — always go through success/warning/danger.
Don't add a gradient-text hero, tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows, or identical icon-card grids.
Don't add confetti, badges-as-rewards, mascots, or playful progress theatrics to onboarding.
Don't build cramped, table-dense enterprise chrome.
Don't introduce a second sans-serif, or use a display typeface for body copy, labels, or data.
Don't reach for a modal as the first solution.
Don't build a component that only has a default state.
